task_goal: Move the file sunset.jpg from Alarms within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area to the Pictures within the same sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area in the Android filesystem.
task_goal_rewrite: The file sunset.jpg is successfully moved from the Alarms folder to the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area of the Android filesystem.

checkpoints.description: The file sunset.jpg is present in the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or file explorer view showing sunset.jpg listed in the Pictures folder of the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area.

checkpoints.description: The file sunset.jpg is no longer present in the Alarms folder within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or file explorer view of the Alarms folder in the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area showing sunset.jpg is not listed.

success_rule: Success is determined when both required checkpoints are satisfied: sunset.jpg exists in the Pictures folder and is absent from the Alarms folder within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area.
